articles.title: Identifying Necessary Transparency Moments In Agentic AI (Part 1)
articles.summary: Designing for agentic AI requires attention to both the system’s behavior and the transparency of its actions. Between the black box and the data dump lies a more thoughtful approach. Victor Yocco explores how to map decision points and reveal the right moments to build trust through clarity, not noise.

articles.title: Sonos's new portable speaker is making me wish I threw more parties
articles.summary: The stunning Sonos Play is my new favourite bluetooth speaker.

articles.title: Most products don’t need tone of voice — they need a point
articles.summary:
Instead of BS rules that no one will open twice, focus on what’s useful (like plain English, active voice, and good timing).
Continue reading on UX Collective »

articles.title: How To Improve UX In Legacy Systems
articles.summary: Practical guidelines for driving UX impact in organizations with legacy systems and broken processes. Brought to you by Measuring UX Impact, **friendly video course on UX** and design patterns by Vitaly.

articles.title: "Design isn’t something you look at, it’s something you live in": 5 questions with Wybe Magermans
articles.summary: WMH&I's director of strategy & growth discusses the flaws of design pretending to be strategy and the future of the creative industry.
